//: Lint-time typecheck config for the integration tests. The tests run under `node --test` (which strips types), so this is purely the `moon run integration:lint` target. `types: [node]` pulls in node:test / node:assert / process without dragging @types/bun's globals in. `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` is relaxed here (as in ioc@fnioc's integration) to keep the DI token-map assertions readable without `!` on every lookup; the production packages keep it on. tsc resolves each @fnioc/* import via the `types` export condition -> src, so the provider `declare module` augmentations enter this program and addJsonFile/addEnvironmentVariables/addCommandLine typecheck on ConfigurationBuilder.
